title: Assertion fault on SQL input (2)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_t1 (rootpage Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY rootpage;
INSERT INTO fuzz_t1 VALUES (0.0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rootpage = rootpage;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fuzz_trig_io AS SELECT * FROM fuzz_t1 WHERE 0.0;
key_bug_features: Assertion fault on DELETE trigger with conflicting inserts
